issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for schema validation and query failures.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment, which is a minor platform assumption.

scenarios.name: Typed User schema with validation and password hashing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Schema<IUser> generic, select: false on passwordHash, the isModified guard in pre('save'), and statics.findByEmail lowercasing input; baseline gets the schema shape but misses the select: false and isModified pattern.

scenarios.name: Atomic User + Post creation via transaction
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses mongoose.startSession with session.withTransaction and the array-form create() with { session }, while baseline tends to use manual commit/abort or single-doc create that breaks the session option.
